name: Power Switch
description: Main power on/off switch for the welder.

name: LCD Display
description: Digital display showing process selection, settings, warnings, and welding parameters.

name: Left Knob
description: Used to set wire diameter/rod diameter/electrode diameter (depending on process) and adjust Wire Feed Speed or output amperage.

name: Right Knob
description: Used to set material thickness, adjust voltage, and toggle TIG torch/electrode holder on/off.

name: Control Knob (Main)
description: Main navigation and selection knob. Turn to scroll through processes and settings, press to select. Also used to adjust optional settings (Run-In WFS, Inductance, Spot Timer, Hot Start, Arc Force, Save/Recall).

name: Home Button
description: Returns to the home/process selection screen on the LCD Display.

name: Back Button
description: Returns to the previous screen on the LCD Display.

name: Wire Feed Power Cable
description: Power cable socket for the wire feed system. Connects to Positive (+) socket for MIG (DCEP) or Negative (-) socket for Flux-Cored (DCEN).

name: Spool Gun Gas Outlet
description: Gas outlet for connecting an optional Spool Gun's gas hose.

name: MIG Gun / Spool Gun Cable Socket
description: Socket for connecting the MIG Gun or optional Spool Gun cable connector.

name: Negative Socket
description: Negative (-) polarity output socket. Cable assignment varies by process (Ground Clamp for MIG/DCEP and Stick/DCEP; Wire Feed Power Cable for Flux-Cored/DCEN; TIG Torch Cable for TIG/DCEN).

name: Positive Socket
description: Positive (+) polarity output socket. Cable assignment varies by process (Wire Feed Power Cable for MIG/DCEP; Ground Clamp for Flux-Cored/DCEN and TIG/DCEN; Electrode Holder Cable for Stick/DCEP).

name: Storage Compartment
description: Built-in storage compartment on the front panel of the welder.

name: Cold Wire Feed Switch
description: Press and hold to feed wire through the MIG Gun without energizing the welder. Used during initial wire setup.

name: Idler Arm
description: Spring-loaded arm that provides pressure on the wire against the Feed Roller. Moves up when Feed Tensioner is released.

name: Wire Feed Mechanism
description: The drive mechanism that feeds welding wire from the spool through the liner and out the MIG Gun. Includes socket for Gun Cable Connector.

name: Wire Spool
description: Holds the welding wire. Supports up to 12 lb spools. Must unwind clockwise.

name: Spool Knob
description: Screws into the Spool Adapter for 10-12 lb spools to secure them in place.

name: Feed Tensioner
description: Adjustable tensioner that controls pressure on the wire feed. Recommended tension: 3-5 for solid wire, 2-3 for flux-cored wire. Turn clockwise to increase tension.

name: Wire Inlet Liner
description: Guides the welding wire from the spool into the feed mechanism.

name: Feed Roller Knob
description: Secures the Feed Roller in place. Unscrew to access and flip/replace the Feed Roller for different wire types and sizes.

name: Wire Feed Control Socket
description: Socket inside the welder for connecting the Wire Feed Control Cable from the MIG Gun or Spool Gun.

name: Foot Pedal Socket
description: Socket inside the welder for connecting an optional Foot Pedal cable for TIG welding amperage control.
